feature: Test Session Persistence and Outcome Tracking
description: Record hex test outcomes in SpacetimeDB for trend analysis, flake detection, and regression comparison. ADR-058.

phases.name: SpacetimeDB test-results module
phases.description: Create WASM module with TestSession and TestResult tables, plus reducers for recording and querying.

tasks.name: Create test-results SpacetimeDB module
tasks.description: New crate spacetime-modules/test-results/ with tables: test_session (id, agent_id, commit_hash, branch, started_at, finished_at, trigger, overall_status, pass_count, fail_count, skip_count, total_count, duration_ms) and test_result (id, session_id, category, name, status, duration_ms, error_message, file_path). Reducers: record_session, record_result, prune_old_sessions.

phases.name: Test runner collection
phases.description: Modify hex test runner to collect TestSession/TestResult structs and POST them to nexus.

tasks.name: Add result collection to test runner
tasks.description: Extend TestResults struct in hex-cli/src/commands/test.rs to collect structured results (category, name, status, duration_ms, error_message). Add a to_session() method that builds a TestSession with git HEAD, branch, agent_id, and aggregated counts.

tasks.name: POST results to nexus after test run
tasks.description: After all test categories complete, POST the TestSession JSON to /api/test-sessions. Fire-and-forget — never fail the test run if recording fails. Fall back to appending to ~/.hex/test-sessions/{date}.jsonl if nexus unreachable.

phases.name: REST endpoints for test sessions
phases.description: Add nexus REST endpoints for recording and querying test sessions.

tasks.name: Add test session REST routes
tasks.description: Add routes in hex-nexus: POST /api/test-sessions (record), GET /api/test-sessions (list recent, paginated), GET /api/test-sessions/:id (full session with results), GET /api/test-sessions/trends (pass rate per category over last N runs).

phases.name: CLI history and trends commands
phases.description: Add hex test history and hex test trends CLI commands.

tasks.name: Add test history subcommand
tasks.description: Add History variant to TestAction. Calls GET /api/test-sessions and displays recent runs in a table: commit, branch, pass/fail/skip counts, duration, overall status with color coding.

tasks.name: Add test trends subcommand
tasks.description: Add Trends variant to TestAction. Calls GET /api/test-sessions/trends and displays pass rate per category as a compact sparkline or bar chart using unicode block characters.

phases.name: Flake and regression detection
phases.description: Analyze historical results to detect flaky tests and regressions.

tasks.name: Add flake detection endpoint
tasks.description: GET /api/test-sessions/flaky — returns tests that have both pass and fail outcomes within last 10 sessions on same branch with no code changes to the test file.

tasks.name: Add regression comparison to test runner
tasks.description: After recording a test session, fetch the previous session on the same branch. Compare results — if a previously-passing test now fails, print a REGRESSION warning with the commit range.

success_metrics: hex test all records results to SpacetimeDB after every run
hex test history shows last 10 runs with pass/fail counts
hex test trends shows pass rate sparklines per category
Regressions are flagged automatically after each test run
Flaky tests are discoverable via API endpoint
dependency_order: P1 (tier 0) → P2 + P3 (parallel, tier 1) → P4 (tier 2) → P5 (tier 3)
